case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP vs. HERNANDEZ, CONNIE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1545 EDDY ST. #S3518, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $124.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE
DECLARATION OF WALEY LEE & TODD ROTHBARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP SERVED AUG-22-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES,A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE $907.50 RENT, $124.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,031.50

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CONNIE
